title: Add an optional area filter to the build-tasks list endpoint response shaping
summary: Add a non-financial, read-path refinement: shape the build-tasks list response to include a derived 'is_claimable' boolean. Shared business logic; needs stronger tests and human review before merge.
prohibited_actions: touch wallet / fund / escrow / settlement code
acceptance_criteria: List response gains a derived is_claimable boolean (status === 'open' && not expired)
Existing state machine and fields are unchanged
New unit test covers is_claimable derivation for each status
deliverables: Read-path shaping change in the contribution layer
definition_of_done: Derived field added on the read path only; no write-path or state-machine change; tests green; maintainer has reviewed the diff.

assurance.notes: medium risk: CI green + maintainer review before merge
